title: Randombar
description: Selects a random hotbar slot after placing a block
body:
# DEPRECATED **See [Block Palettes](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-palettes) for newer version**

Information

Randombar is a client side mod that allows the player to randomly select a random hotbar slot upon placing a block.
The purpose for this mod is to add some detail in your builds.

Commands

/randombar <Minimum hotbar slot (1-9)> <Maximum hotbar slot (1-9)>

Example:
/randombar 5 9
When placing a block a random slot between 5 and 9 (both inclusive) will be selected.

Hotkeys

Press the 'r' key to toggle the random slot selection on and off.
